content.text: I have class attributes defined as constants (e.g., STATUS_COMPLETE=1), and I want a helper function to convert an ID like 1 back into its readable string name 'STATUS COMPLETE'.
What happens if my class attributes use mixed case, like STATUSComplete?

The current logic relies on checking if the first character is in `string.ascii_uppercase`. If you used inconsistent casing (e.g., `statusComplete`), the function would fail to find it correctly because the check is too restrictive.
That makes sense; I'll make sure all my constants follow a uniform naming convention.
